justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for 2:15 PM tomorrow and then accurately understood the follow-up request for around 9 AM tomorrow.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial slot was unavailable, the agent offered relevant alternative times for the same day and the next, demonstrating good negotiation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, booking the appointment in just three turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
